title: Less Than Enough Items
description: A solely client side mod meant to view recipes like JEI or EMI or REI but for 1.21.4. **Currently in beta**
body:
A **beta** project meant to replicate the **Abilities of projects like JEI or EMI or even REI.** This project is a **less than ideal** solution and is hence in **beta**, I've been improving it and it's almost user friendly now. I'm not sure if I have the time to backport this to 1.21.2 or update to 1.21.9. But the project has been doing pretty well so **after I finish it for 1.21.4 I'll likely update and backport it**. **Its open source if anyone wants to improve it just credit me as the creator of the source.**
